name: No-Bake Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese in the microwave and mix thoroughly with the sugar.
2. Add the sour cream to the mixture and blend well.
3. Once the sour cream is fully incorporated, add the whipped topping and mix until combined.
4. Spoon the mixture into the graham cracker pie crust.
5. Chill for at least an hour.
6. This no-bake cheesecake goes well with fresh fruit slices on top or a can of cherry or strawberry pie filling spooned over each slice.
Note: Do not turn off the microwave prematurely to prevent the mixture from becoming unevenly mixed.
